---
version: 0.0.1
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ../../assets/csl/apa.csl
author:
  - name: Samuel Szoniecky
    orcid: 0000-0002-7643-3342
    email: samuel.szoniecky@univ-paris8.fr
    affiliations:
      - name: Laboratoire Paragraphe
        address: Université Paris 8
        city: Saint-Denis
        country: France
---

Article pour : [Ontologies et humanités numériques](https://journals.openedition.org/revuehn/5330)
